tests.title: An uncaught error was detected outside of a test
tests.fullTitle: An uncaught error was detected outside of a test

err.message:
CypressError: The following error originated from your test code, not from Cypress.

  > `Cypress.env()` does not work when `allowCypressEnv` is set to `false`. Please migrate to `cy.env()` or leverage other stateful methods to manage variables. The variable being accessed was: `updateSnapshots`

When Cypress detects uncaught errors originating from your test code it will automatically fail the current test.

Cypress could not associate this error to any specific test.

We dynamically generated a new test to display this failure.

https://on.cypress.io/cypress-env-migration
